canonical_answer: At 6s, underwater scene begins with sandy seabed visible under murky water; at 12s, indistinct dark blurry shapes appear scattered on rippled seabed; at 18s, person wearing blue-rimmed snorkel mask appears holding small dark object with both hands.

question: Describe the lighting effects and specific equipment worn by the diver as time progresses.
canonical_answer: At 6s, sunlight refracts through surface creating moving caustic patterns on sea floor; at 12s, sunlight filters through water creating bright shifting patterns on sandy bottom; at 18s, person wearing black wristwatch on left wrist holds object underwater.
